age_range.evidence: Two age groups were targeted: adolescents aged 15–16 years and young adults aged 20–24 years.

countries.evidence: the Human Development Index (HDI) in Bogotá and Lima and the Unsatisfied Basic Needs Index (NBI) in Buenos Aires

fieldwork_year.evidence: Participants were recruited between April 2021 and November 2022

sample_size.evidence: The study included a total of 1280 participants with symptoms of depression and/or anxiety at baseline,
